titleStmt.title: SII 6.112: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 112. (A.R. No. 154 of 1897). ON A SLAB USED AS A MORTAR IN THE HOUSE OF THE PUJARI OF THE SAME TEMPLE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
danakhiḷa viśvaṁbhareyōḷ . vṛ
raḷkipeḷu peḷasuti¨rppinegaṁ nijakōpapāvakajvāḷegaḷinde suṭṭu maleyēḷumanramadiṁde kū
ḍe ni¨rmmūḷisi kī¨rttiyaṁ taḷadanalte mahēśvaradaṇḍanāyakaṁ . Ā vibhuvina vallabhe bhūdēvi vacōdēvi
lakṣmīdēviyenalu peṁpāvagamama¨rddire paṁpādēvi poga¨rtteya nega[¨rtte]yaṁ taḷedi¨rddaḷ .
Ā vadhuvuṁ varanuṁ nānāvidhadiṁ nōntu vaiṣṇavārādhaneyaṁ tāvosedu māḍi paḍedar śrī
varanene nega¨rddanantadaṇḍādhipana . rāyatuḷappavallabhana naccinabīlu kharacakranugra khaḷgāyu
dhavā¨rddutū¨rddiḍuva kakkaḍeyi¨rppa voli¨rdda pa¨rjjeyaśrīyumanāyumaṁ taḷadu jīyena lōka
vanantapāḷa nārāyaṇa vāvaṇa pramukhalakkaṇadēvaTheve is written below the line.nenippa nālvaru . Aṁtā nālvaroḷ vi
krāntadhanaṁjayananantapāḷaṁ nijabhūkāntanemayoḷu nega¨rddaṁ kuntaḷanarapāḷa rājyabhara
dhaurēya . Ā viprakuḷōttamana ma lakṣmidēvi vāgdēvi jayaśrīdēvi yeni
si nega¨rddu mahādēvi mahāvibhū vadhugaṁ vibhugaviḷādēvakuḷō
ttamarenippa sutarudiyi nā vāvaṇa gōvindadēva vesaresa
vinaga . © Antā vipravaṁsōtta galuṁ nijapratāpamentendaḍe .
nilisaṁ peṁcegiśaṁnacaṁnniyoḷatu ntaṁ vikramāṁkaṁ besasale na
ladaṁ kēḷdu kāḷiṁgarāyataleyaṁ kāla ya nāgi¨rddanendande mi¨rkkā kaliballā
ḷappanantaṁgabi doḷavade bennīvudāśca[¨ryya] dadinanantapāḷavibhu dō¨rvvaḷavi
kra masavyasāciyeṁbuda nida nāve pēḷadoḍe bēgiyanuppina kaṭṭiyaṁ bisuṭṭō
ḍida naṁbikaṁbivaragaṁbiṟutōḍi naga¨rttegeṭṭa dō¨rmmadavaḷidi¨rdda cōḷikare pēḷare sāhasaṁgaḷa .
Ēḷida daṇḍanāyakaranē vesavoddape cōḷarājyani¨rmmūḷana (.) naṁdhramaṇḍaḷikamasta
kaśūḷana . cakrakūṭasaṁcāḷana gū¨rjarapraḷeyakāḷana (.) naggadananta
pāḷanēṁ pēḷa caḷukyakuntaḷanarēṁdra mahēśvaranaṁkakārana .
Digital edition of SII 6.112 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
